blocks.text: Great! Now I'll run DESeq2 in R:

input.code:
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load counts and metadata
counts_path <- file.path(Sys.getenv('WORK_DIR'), 'counts_de.csv')
metadata_path <- file.path(Sys.getenv('WORK_DIR'), 'metadata_de.csv')

counts <- read.csv(counts_path, row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv(metadata_path, row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Ensure counts are integers (DESeq2 requirement)
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
storage.mode(counts) <- "integer"

# Match column order
metadata <- metadata[colnames(counts), , drop=FALSE]

cat("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts,
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created\n")
